changes.description: Replaced pseudocode-heavy skill with a complete, copy-paste-ready Node.js solver script. Key changes: (1) Provided a full working solve.js script that reads jobs.json and writes schedule.json, (2) Used a greedy approach selecting the operation+machine combo with earliest completion time, (3) Added robust downtime avoidance with a loop that shifts past all overlapping windows, (4) Reduced verbose explanations to minimal rules section, (5) Fixed buggy downtime check logic from original pseudocode
